arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher questions Brendan Rodgers' achievements at Celtic with Rangers claim
arts.sum: But Celtic fan Quinny, who was a special guest, put Carragher right and pointed towards Scottish football getting ‘talked down’. Jamie Carragher questions Brendan Rodgers’ success at Celtic as Rangers are ‘so bad’

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen's Granit Xhaka: "I'm convinced we'll beat Bayern Munich"
arts.sum: Granit Xhaka says defending champions Bayer Leverkusen are ready to rise to the occasion when they face Bayern Munich on Matchday 22, arguably needing a win to have any chance of reeling in the Bundesliga leaders. Xhaka: "We won't go into the game with the plan to play for a draw, we want to win every game, whether that's against Bayern on Saturday, or against any other team.
